title: R2D-RL: A RoboCup 2D Soccer Environment for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: arXiv:2606.18786v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Robot soccer is a challenging testbed for multi-agent reinforcement learning because it combines partial observability, cooperative and adversarial interaction, sparse rewards, and long-horizon tactical behavior. RoboCup 2D Soccer Simulation (RCSS2D) provides a mature robot-soccer platform, but its competition-oriented server-client architecture is difficult to use directly with modern Python-based MARL workflows. We introduce R2D-RL, a reinforcement learning environment that connects RCSS2D and HELIOS-based player clients to a Python MARL interface through shared-memory communication and cycle-level synchronization. R2D-RL supports full-field and scenario-based training with configurable opponents, Base discrete and Hybrid parameterized action spaces, action masks, expected possession value (EPV)-based reward shaping, and parallel execution. We provide front-goal scenarios and an 11-vs-11 full-field benchmark, together with baseline

Title: R2D-RL: A RoboCup 2D Soccer Environment for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
Abstract: arXiv:2606.18786v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Robot soccer is a challenging testbed for multi-agent reinforcement learning because it combines partial observability, cooperative and adversarial interaction, sparse rewards, and long-horizon tactical behavior. We provide front-goal scenarios and an 11-vs-11 full-field benchmark, together with baseline
translated_title: R2D-RL：一个用于多智能体强化学习的RoboCup 2D足球环境
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.18786v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：机器人足球是多智能体强化学习的一个具有挑战性的试验平台，因为它结合了部分可观测性、合作与对抗交互、稀疏奖励以及长视野战术行为。RoboCup 2D足球仿真（RCSS2D）提供了一个成熟的机器人足球平台，但其面向竞赛的服务器-客户端架构难以直接与现代基于Python的MARL工作流结合使用。我们推出了R2D-RL，这是一个强化学习环境，通过共享内存通信和周期级同步，将RCSS2D和基于HELIOS的球员客户端连接到Python MARL接口。R2D-RL支持全场和基于场景的训练，具备可配置对手、基础离散和混合参数化动作空间、动作掩码、基于预期控球值（EPV）的奖励塑造以及并行执行。我们提供了前场得分场景和一个11对11的全场基准测试，以及基线方案。
tldr: 本文提出了R2D-RL，一个将RoboCup 2D足球仿真环境与现代Python多智能体强化学习框架高效连接的环境，解决了传统服务器-客户端架构难以集成的问题，并支持全场与场景化训练、可配置对手、混合动作空间和基于EPV的奖励设计。
en_tdlr: This paper introduces R2D-RL, an environment that efficiently connects the RoboCup 2D soccer simulation with modern Python-based multi-agent reinforcement learning frameworks, addressing the integration difficulty of the traditional server-client architecture, and supporting full-field and scenario-based training, configurable opponents, hybrid action spaces, and EPV-based reward shaping.
